subcodes.first_line: O servant of the True One! The millstone of the world is in perpetual motion, and all created things, like unto grains, are ground and obliterated by this movement [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده حق آسیاب جهان در گردش است و جمیع خلق مانند دانه نرم و محو از این جنبش
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @light and darkness, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @the Kingdom of God [Malakut]
